subcodes.first_line: O God-given one! Be thou a divine bestowal and a bounty of the Abhá Beauty, that thou mayest become a mercy unto the world of humanity and a gift from the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداداد داد خدا باش و بخشش جمال ابهی تا رحمت عالم انسانی باشی و موهبت حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @being a source of light; guidance
